query:
SELECT 
  SUM(bad_debt) as total_bad_debt,
  SUM(payment_tx_amount) as total_payment_tx,
  COUNT(*) as total_rows,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as bad_debt_rows,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 1 THEN bad_debt ELSE 0 END) as bad_debt_sum_from_rows
FROM debt_collected_cache
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'

  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as bad_debt_rows,

FROM debt_collected_cache
